ddls:
CREATE TABLE "usage_data" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the year (1-4) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the transaction */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the transaction */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Holiday indicator (0 or 1) */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Weekday of the transaction (0-6) */,
  "working_day" INTEGER /* Working day indicator (0 or 1) */,
  "weather_sit" INTEGER /* Weather situation (1-3) */,
  "temp" REAL /* Average temperature in Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Average 'feels-like' temperature in Celsius */,
  "hum" REAL /* Relative humidity percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "casual" INTEGER /* Number of casual users */,
  "registered" INTEGER /* Number of registered users */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total number of bike-sharing transactions */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending station */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the transaction */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the transaction */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the transaction */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_data_weather_sit FOREIGN KEY ("weather_sit") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_data_casual FOREIGN KEY ("casual") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_data_registered FOREIGN KEY ("registered") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather situation */,
  "weather_sit" INTEGER /* Weather situation code (1-3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather situation */,
  "temperature_high" REAL /* High temperature for the weather situation */,
  "temperature_low" REAL /* Low temperature for the weather situation */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation amount for the weather situation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (casual or registered) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered for the service */,
  "user_age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "user_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "user_city" TEXT /* City of residence for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike-sharing station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of bikes the station can hold */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Status of the station (operational or not) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection for the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Manufacture date of the bike */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance for the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each weather situation
High temperature for the weather situation
Low temperature for the weather situation
Precipitation amount for the weather situation
Date when the user registered for the service
City of residence for the user
Maximum number of bikes the station can hold
Status of the station (operational or not)
Date of the last inspection for the station
Date of the last maintenance for the bike
